form.formComment: At the latest run 7th of 13 at Hanshin Dirt on March 15 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Sneaker Skill with 53.0kg at $74.50. The start before that raced on the pace before fading ran last of 16 at Kyoto Dirt on January 18 over 1400m, 22 len behind Turron carrying 55.0kg at $320. Has the inside gate but looks tested.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 56-day let-up. First-up after three months 3rd of 14 at Tokyo on February 15 over 1600m, 1.5 len behind Effortless with 56.0kg at $2.50. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Tokyo on November 29 over 1600m, 2 len behind Ampadu carrying 55.0kg at $5.50. Fitter again and a winning hope.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months second last of 8 at this track on March 22 over 1600m, 7 len behind Terra Merita with 56.0kg at $16.20. form.formComment: Comes off a 56 day let-up. Last start 5th of 11 at Kyoto on February 15 over 1800m, 6 len behind Nebra Disk carrying 58.0kg at $64.90. Before that 5th of 7 at Kyoto on February 1 over 1600m, 3 len behind G T Dress with 55.0kg at $33.10. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign ninth of 11 at Kyoto January 5 over 1800m, 8 len behind Chernobog carrying 58.0kg at $180. First up last campaign 12th of 16 at this track December 20 over 1200m, 7 len behind Blue Eyed Girl with 58.0kg at $229.90. Might need the run.

form.formComment: Most recently 7th of 16 at Chukyo on March 28 over 1400m, 3 len behind Knocknarea carrying 56.0kg at $11.10. The race before that 3rd of 7 at Kyoto on February 1 over 1600m, 2 len behind G T Dress with 56.0kg at $13.90. Thereabouts last start and looks a definite winning hope.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 6th of 16 at Chukyo on March 28 over 1400m, 2 len behind Knocknarea with 56.0kg at $6. form.formComment: Returns from a 36-day let-up. Last start ran last of 10 at this track on March 7 over 1600m, 7 len behind Lady Mykonos carrying 56.0kg at $19.30. The run before that couldn't go on with it; 12th of 16 at Nakayama Dirt on January 18 over 1800m, 16 len behind Lady Frances carrying 56.0kg at $13.40. On her best form she can take this out.
